{{Quote|No one ''ever'' threatens me and lives to tell about it.|Zippa to [[Lorn Pavan]]|<ref name="Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter">''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]''</ref>}}
'''Zippa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] merchant in the lower levels of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in the years prior to the rise of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. He once tried to sell [[Lorn Pavan]] a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]], which he mistakenly believed to be a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Holocron/Legends|Holocron]]. The two, along with Zippa's [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] bodyguard [[Bilk]] and Pavan's [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[I-5YQ]], met in [[booth nine]], a [[Holobooth/Legends|holobooth]] in a [[Unidentified holobooth provider|holobooth provider]] suggested for the meeting by the Toydarian. When Pavan questioned the authenticity of the Holocron, Zippa accused Pavan of being a "closet [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]," causing Pavan to react violently. Pavan soon backed down, but after a deal was reached, Bilk held the pair at [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]-point and Zippa took both the Holocron and fifteen thousand Republic [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from Pavan and flew from the booth. Bilk remained to kill I-5YQ and Pavan, but I-5YQ killed Bilk, and Pavan and the droid tried to chase Zippa, but were unable to find him.

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'' {{Ab|Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
